name: Plaintext Storage of a Password
description: The product stores a password in plaintext in an accessible resource such as a configuration file, registry entry, or memory. Anyone with access to these resources can read the unencrypted password and gain unauthorized access to the protected system.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH nodes (passwords, credentials) flowing to STORAGE nodes (configuration files, databases, registry, memory) without a TRANSFORM mediator (hashing function, key derivation function like bcrypt/scrypt/argon2) that converts the password to an irreversible hash before storage.
